text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the day of the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes
arrives.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The stands are packed—though I would expect no
less of a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer. I imagine the nerves must be
starting to sink in.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Then once again, I'll let you take on the
nervous feeling for the both of us. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai F.S. is not the only challenge I face
today.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The attendees undoubtedly have only
Maruzensky on the mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's exactly why I have to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not as "the next Maruzensky" or "Maruzensky's
successor," but as a runner with the ability to
reach the top.
